notes: Schema 2.0 rewrite: Memory_Test-only regression suite. The requested capability counts summed to 110 while total cases was fixed at 100; this file normalizes the distribution to 100 cases with 88 answer and 12 refuse cases, keeps every answer target under Memory_Test, and uses exact target_clues from real corpus text.

cases.query: 极光账本的唯一事实卡里，核心事实是什么？

target_clues: - 核心事实：极光账本的试点客户只允许选择 3 家：禾川物流、南屿商贸、钧石制造。
